pages.text:
بِسْمِ الَّه الرَّحْمَن الرَّحِيمِ

Istana Turul Iman

Negara Brunei Darussalam

لعبا

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION TO THE CONVENTION RELATING

TO INTERNATIONAL EXHIBITION

WHEREAS, the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was signed at Paris on 22nd November 1928 (hereinafter referred to as "the

Convention"), modified by the Protocol of 16'h November 1966, 30th

November 1972 and amended on 24' June 1982 and 31st May 1988,

NOW THEREFORE I, SULTAN HAJI HASSANAL BOLKIAH

MU'IZZADDIN WADDAULAH, Sultan and Yang Di-Pertuan of Brunei

Darussalam, declare that the Government of Brunei Darussalam, having considered the said Convention and Protocol, hereby accedes to the same in conformity with Article I!! of the Protocol and undertakes faithfully to perform and carry out the stipulations therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have signed this instrument of accession at

Bandar Seri Begawan on 10th April in the year Two Thousand and Twenty- Three.

SULTAN HAJI HASSANAL BOLKIAH

OF BRUNEI DARUSSALAM
